title: [phase:plan] [family:orchestrator] startup bootstrap plan lane. Startup canary only. Do not inspect the repository. Hold lane active for bootstrap manifest.
summary_text: # Plan Establish a startup bootstrap planning lane in canary-only hold state, without inspecting the repository, so execution can begin cleanly once the bootstrap manifest is provided. The approach is to define the lane contract, hold conditions, activation criteria, and validation gates up front while deferring any repo-aware work. ## Scope - In: startup canary planning, hold-state definition, bootstrap manifest intake contract, activation and abort criteria - Out: repository inspection, code changes, workflow edits, implementation dispatch, runtime validation against repo contents ## Action items [ ] Declare the lane as `startup-canary` and keep it in active hold until a bootstrap manifest is received. [ ] Record the hard constraint that no repository inspection is allowed during this bootstrap phase. [ ] Define the expected bootstrap manifest fields: objective, startup boundaries, execution owner, safety constraints, and release signal. [ ] Specify canary-only success criteria for bootstrap readiness, including what qualifies as safe to unlock the lane. [ ] Specify abort criteria for the startup hold, including missing manifest fields, conflicting control-plane intent, or unsafe startup scope. [ ] Define the first post-manifest action as a non-destructive intake pass that revalidates scope before any implementation planning. [ ] Reserve validation gates for manifest completeness, startup intent clarity, and canary containment before lane progression. [ ] Hold the lane state unchanged until the bootstrap manifest arrives or the startup directive is explicitly withdrawn. ## Open questions - What exact manifest schema should this lane treat as authoritative? - What signal should release the lane from hold: explicit user instruction, workflow event, or manifest field? - Should startup canary remain planning-only after manifest intake, or immediately transition to a deeper planning pass?
